titles.en: Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)
Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)

segments: الرَّجُلِ يُبَايِعُ الرَّجُلَ عَلَى الشَّيْ‌ءِ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ أَصْلُ الشَّيْ‌ءِ حَلَالًا.
arabic.text: الرَّجُلِ يُبَايِعُ الرَّجُلَ عَلَى الشَّيْ‌ءِ فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ إِذَا كَانَ أَصْلُ الشَّيْ‌ءِ حَلَالًا.

segments:
Hadith.4032 - Yunus ibn Abd al-Rahman narrated from more than one person, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who trades with another man over something.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm, as long as the origin of the item is lawful."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4032 - Yunus ibn Abd al-Rahman narrated from more than one person, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who trades with another man over something.
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm, as long as the origin of the item is lawful."

narratorChain.raw: 4032 - رَوَى يُونُسُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ عَنْ غَيْرِ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي

titles.en: Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)

segments: ‌ قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ الرَّجُلُ يَكُونُ لَهُ الْمَالُ فَيَدْخُلُ عَلَى صَاحِبِهِ يَبِيعُهُ لُؤْلُؤَةً تُسَاوِي مِائَةَ دِرْهَمٍ بِأَلْفِ دِرْهَمٍ وَ يُؤَخِّرُ عَلَيْهِ الْمَالَ إِلَى وَقْتٍ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ قَدْ أَمَرَنِي أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَفَعَلْتُ ذَلِكَ.
arabic.text: ‌ قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ الرَّجُلُ يَكُونُ لَهُ الْمَالُ فَيَدْخُلُ عَلَى صَاحِبِهِ يَبِيعُهُ لُؤْلُؤَةً تُسَاوِي مِائَةَ دِرْهَمٍ بِأَلْفِ دِرْهَمٍ وَ يُؤَخِّرُ عَلَيْهِ الْمَالَ إِلَى وَقْتٍ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ قَدْ أَمَرَنِي أَبِي عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَفَعَلْتُ ذَلِكَ.

segments:
Hadith.4033 - Muhammad ibn Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as): "A man has wealth and goes to another man who sells him a pearl worth one hundred dirhams for one thousand dirhams, deferring the payment to a later time."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it. My father (as) instructed me to do so, and I did it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4033 - Muhammad ibn Ishaq ibn Ammar narrated:
I said to Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar-Ridha (as): "A man has wealth and goes to another man who sells him a pearl worth one hundred dirhams for one thousand dirhams, deferring the payment to a later time."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it. My father (as) instructed me to do so, and I did it."

narratorChain.raw: 4033 - وَ- رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ

parts.text: 4033 - وَ- رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْحَاقَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)

segments: ‌ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَيَّنْتُ رَجُلًا عِينَةً فَحَلَّتْ عَلَيْهِ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ اقْضِنِي قَالَ لَيْسَ عِنْدِي فَعَيِّنِّي حَتَّى أَقْضِيَكَ قَالَ عَيِّنْهُ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَكَ.
arabic.text: ‌ قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَيَّنْتُ رَجُلًا عِينَةً فَحَلَّتْ عَلَيْهِ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ اقْضِنِي قَالَ لَيْسَ عِنْدِي فَعَيِّنِّي حَتَّى أَقْضِيَكَ قَالَ عَيِّنْهُ حَتَّى يَقْضِيَكَ.

segments:
Hadith.4034 - It is narrated from Safwan al-Jammal, who said:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "I appointed a specific loan (aynah) for a man, and it became due. I said to him, 'Repay me.'
He said: 'I do not have it now, so specify another loan for me until I can repay you.'"
Imam (as) said: "Specify it for him until he repays you."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4034 - It is narrated from Safwan al-Jammal, who said:
I said to Abu Abdullah (as): "I appointed a specific loan (aynah) for a man, and it became due. I said to him, 'Repay me.'
He said: 'I do not have it now, so specify another loan for me until I can repay you.'"
Imam (as) said: "Specify it for him until he repays you."

narratorChain.raw: 4034 - وَ- رُوِيَ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ الْجَمَّالِ‌ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on Barter and Transaction with Immediate Buyback (inah)

segments: الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ الْمَالُ فَإِذَا حَلَّ قَالَ لَهُ بِعْنِي مَتَاعاً حَتَّى أَبِيعَهُ وَ أَقْضِيَكَ الَّذِي لَكَ عَلَيَّ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ.
arabic.text: الرَّجُلِ يَكُونُ لَهُ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ الْمَالُ فَإِذَا حَلَّ قَالَ لَهُ بِعْنِي مَتَاعاً حَتَّى أَبِيعَهُ وَ أَقْضِيَكَ الَّذِي لَكَ عَلَيَّ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ.

segments:
Hadith.4035 - It is narrated from Bakkar ibn Abi Bakr, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who has a debt owed to him by another man. When the debt becomes due, the debtor says to him, "Sell me some goods so that I may sell them and repay you what I owe."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.4035 - It is narrated from Bakkar ibn Abi Bakr, from Abu Abdullah (as), regarding a man who has a debt owed to him by another man. When the debt becomes due, the debtor says to him, "Sell me some goods so that I may sell them and repay you what I owe."
Imam (as) said: "There is no harm in it."

narratorChain.raw: 4035 - وَ- رُوِيَ عَنْ بَكَّارِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي
